name: diltiazem
drug_class_research_label: non-dihydropyridine calcium channel blocker / Class IV antiarrhythmic (research label; not a clinical recommendation)

stub_provenance_note: SMILES and InChIKey are literature values for diltiazem (PubChem CID 39186); ic50 values are stub estimates pending real assay lookup. Mechanism escalation requires Runpod-real simulation.
